description: A curriculum committee member needs to verify the official prerequisites for an existing course before approving a new, dependent course.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the target course.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the official prerequisite information from the curriculum management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that the prerequisite for 'CHEM301' is 'CHEM201 with a grade of C or better'.

nodes.task_description: Provide the verified prerequisite information to the committee member.
